data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁 #42
data.summary: [7/22(Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-ga
data.body:
[7/22(Tue) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total Assault.

The following players have been banned, and their rankings have been deleted for exploiting and abusing the in-game system under our service policies.

- Total number of players banned: 16
- Period of Restriction: Permanent

▶ Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=3052133

#BlueArchive
![1.jfif](https://kivo.wiki/files/15949/aX8bDBR40tmja4OJM7ymC4V0WbhumsLg.jpg)
